positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic lunar fox (kitsune-inspired) leaping through an overgrown, bioluminescent forest. The fox has multiple tails that trail with glowing, cosmic energy. The background features stylized, geometric flora and fauna illuminated by large, stylized moons and constellations. Use a clean, modern vaporwave aesthetic with deep indigo, electric teal, neon magenta, and starlight gold accents. Emphasize strong, bold silhouettes, high contrast, and a centralized composition suitable for a graphic t-shirt print. Vector art style, flat color blocking, clean lines, intricate detail, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signatures, realistic photo, low detail, messy, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, trademark, disfigured
